name: hb_1_33
requirements: As part of your analysis, define emission intensity as the total exhaust_gas over all polluting companies in the district (0 if none). For 2025-06-05 06:00-10:00 compute and store: total_exhaust_lianchi (Lianchi), total_exhaust_jingxiu (Jingxiu), total_exhaust_mancheng (Mancheng) (float), highest_intensity_district_id (the district_id of the highest-intensity district, int).

turns.query: Analyze which districts in 保定市 (Lianchi, Jingxiu, or Mancheng) had the highest emission intensity on 2025-06-05 during morning hours (06:00-10:00).
